title: Emporio Prosciutto v23 Residual Error — Root Cause
rootCause: GPT Pass C fails to populate discount_pct (17.50%) in structured output on most v23 runs. Without discount_pct, bindMonetaryColumns uses gross_unit_price as unit_price and either inflates total as qty×gross (when line_total_net also null) or preserves a near-correct total while leaving unit_price at gross.

classification.secondary: Binder limitation (no net derivation without discount_pct)
classification.gtNote: VL GT total €35.14 vs visible €36.54 is a separate €1.40 catalog definition gap — not the main v23 regression driver

mechanism.visibleColumns: Qtd 4,30 | Preço Unit 10,30€ | Desc 17,50 | Preço Total 36,54€
mechanism.gptFailure: Reads gross_unit_price (~10.3) but omits discount_pct; line_total_net intermittent

binderWhenAllStructured.note: Binder works correctly when GPT supplies all three structured fields — verified by local simulation

historicalContext.v23: structured schema removes legacy total field — worse totals when line_total_net null

monetaryColumnBindingRationale: Pomodor net column binding likely OK vs visible invoice; Prosciutto remains OPEN due to discount_pct omission; VL GT/catalog gaps persist on Pomodor qty; Emporio other rows not re-validated on v23
